title: goodyera novembrilis
intro: Goodyera novembrilis, also known as November gentian, is a rare and unique orchid species native to North America. The plant contains iridoid glycosides, which are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of November gentian include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or decoction, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, although it should be used with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
